column1: # ruby/spec expectations manifest -- generated by gen_manifest.rb from a
# full measurement at RUBYSPEC_REV (see Makefile). One row per example:
# name<TAB>status. PASS rows are the retention gate's contract
# (make rubyspec-gate); REJECT-BYDESIGN rows are permanent exclusions
# (docs/limitations.md); the rest record the frontier. Regenerate
# deliberately, reviewing the diff, never by hand.
